xtremes
  • Welcome to xtremes’ documentation!
  • View page source

Welcome to xtremes’ documentation!

xtremes is a Python library for various utilities useful in Extreme Value Statistics. So far, you will find tools to fit more than one order statistics for parameter estimation as well as a Bootstrap device.

It is created within the ClimXtreme project and will provide supplementary code and simulations for the papers yet to come.

Check out the Usage section for further information, including how to Installation the project.

Note

This project is under active and heavy development.
